children.name: autostart.nix
children.desc: The actual autostart jobs for this machine -- data only, no logic.

children.name: hidden-devices.nix
children.desc: UUIDs of the devices actually hidden from udisks2/Dolphin on this machine -- data only.

children.name: keyring.nix
children.desc: Enables a system secret-service keyring so apps like Claude Desktop can persist logins instead of re-prompting every restart.

children.name: autostart.nix
children.desc: One real example config.vars.autostart.jobs entry for reference.

children.name: autostart.nix
children.desc: Turns config.vars.autostart.jobs into one independent root systemd unit per job.

children.name: default.nix
children.desc: Declares config.vars.autostart (global enable + per-job jobs schema), no logic.

children.name: architecture.md
children.desc: Explains why one root systemd unit per job replaces the old manifest/run.py/sudoers engine.

children.name: mk-autostart-dispatch.nix
children.desc: Builds the start/stop/restart shell scripts systemd runs for one autostart job.

children.name: mk-autostart-order.nix
children.desc: Asserts config.vars.autostart.jobs has no dependsOn cycles or unknown job references.

children.name: hidden-devices.nix
children.desc: Declares + wires config.vars.hiddenDevices (UUIDs to hide from udisks2), and warns if a reboot is needed.
